This 32-inch display regularly sells for $400, so B&H is offering a $180 discount on it today. Both Samsung and Amazon are offering the same monitor in the black finish for $230, but B&H’s offer on the white one beats them both with an additional $10 off – matching the lowest price we previously tracked for it. There’s also a 43-inch variant of this monitor, which Woot is currently offering for $299.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). This also happens to be the lowest price we have tracked for that model from its usual $500 price tag. Between the two deals, you’re essentially looking at up to 45% off in savings, making this a great time to grab one.
